html:
2026-0558
2026-06-04PS, EMCREmergency Management ActProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 303, Nova ScotiaProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 303 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Nova Scotia with respect to the interface fires that occurred in Nova Scotia, in September and October 2025.N/A
subject: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 303, Nova Scotia
precis: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 303 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Nova Scotia with respect to the interface fires that occurred in Nova Scotia, in September and October 2025.
